name: Rising Son Inc Which Will Do
recent_news: No public news or web presence found for a Sacramento school-bus operator under this exact name; the registered address (1160 Alder Tree Way) appears to be a residential property, suggesting either a very small home-based operation, a dormant entity, or a name variant in a corporate filing.
fit_notes: Listing data shows ~34 employees and school flag, but no operator footprint could be verified online. Too small and unverifiable to prioritize as a Summit tuck-in without direct outreach to confirm operating status and contracts.

name: Community Special Trnsprtn Svc
recent_news: No public news, website, or MDOT bus-carrier authorization found under this exact name; the address (18179 Cornell Rd, Southfield) is a commercial property in metro Detroit. Name strongly suggests a small special-needs/Medicaid transport provider rather than a yellow school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Likely a niche SPED/NEMT van operator rather than a traditional Type C/D school-bus contractor; absence from MDOT authorized bus carriers list reduces relevance. Low priority unless Summit is actively building SPED/alternative-transport capability in Michigan.

name: International Bus Ctr
recent_news: Name and Commerce Township location (825 W Oakley Park Rd) are highly consistent with a bus sales/dealer/service center rather than a contracted school-bus operator. A separately listed 'International Bus Center Inc' in New Haven, MI is shown as closed on Yelp (April 2026). Not authorized as a bus carrier on the MDOT list.
fit_notes: Appears to be a bus dealer/parts/service operation rather than a transportation contractor; not an independent operating school-bus contractor and therefore not a Summit tuck-in target. Exclude from buyer universe.

name: Lincoln Park Bus Ctr Inc
recent_news: No website or active operator footprint found. The address '3064 City Natl Bank Bldg, Detroit, MI 48226' is a suite in the historic City National Bank Building in downtown Detroit, which is a registered-agent/legal address rather than a bus yard, suggesting the entity may be dormant, dissolved, or a holding/dealer entity. Not on MDOT authorized bus carrier list.
fit_notes: No evidence of active school-bus operations; downtown registered-agent address is inconsistent with a fleet operator. Likely a dormant or non-operating entity and not a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Tri-County Truck & Bus Inc
owner_or_parent: Tri-County Truck Centers (formerly Tri-County International Trucks; International/Navistar authorized dealer group serving SE Michigan since 1949)
recent_news: Name and Plymouth, MI location are highly consistent with the Tri-County International Trucks / Tri-County Truck Centers dealer group, which has operated in Michigan for 75+ years selling International trucks and IC school buses with branches in Dearborn, Flint, Jackson, Livonia, and Warren. Not an operating bus contractor and not on the MDOT authorized bus carrier list.
fit_notes: This is a truck/bus dealership (International/IC Bus distributor), not a school-bus transportation contractor. Exclude from Summit tuck-in universe; could however be a useful channel partner/relationship for fleet sourcing in Michigan.
